name: Chilean Cobalt Corp.
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K, unless the context indicates otherwise, Chilean Cobalt, the Company, we, our, ours or us refer to Chilean Cobalt Corp., a Nevada corporation, and its sole subsidiary, Baltum Mineria SpA, Baltum. Our Company We are a critical minerals exploration and development company focused on the La Cobaltera and El Cofre cobalt-copper projects, located in the San Juan District in northern Chile, one of the worlds few known primary cobalt districts.
